testcase.name: testPublishRuleDeleted_exceptionHandled
testcase.system-out: 10:18:16.695 [main] ERROR com.loyalty.service_admin.infrastructure.messaging.RuleEventAdapter -- Failed to publish RULE_DELETED event: ruleId=bc51c34d-5a4f-458f-ba05-30053ce512d3,
